description: StarCaster by Alphire — multi-tenant platform for influencers and creators to establish web presence, promote content, and engage organically across social channels (comments, likes, shares, posts, articles, video).
primaryStack: Vanilla JS SPA + limited React island

keyDirectories.public: Built static assets, JS modules (window.App), React bundle for Campaigns
keyDirectories.src: HTML partials (pages/), CSS sources, layout.html — run npm run build:html
keyDirectories.routes: API route modules (shared dispatcher in routes/index.js)
keyDirectories.lib: Stores, Supabase access, config, project scoping, AI helpers
keyDirectories.ai-daemon: Separate agent service — not the main app server

architecturalNotes: Vanilla JS/HTML monolith is the default for new UI. Edit src/pages/*.html then npm run build:html — do not hand-edit public/index.html for structure. React is used only for Active Campaigns (react-entry.js → public/bundle.js). API keys: lib/config.js env vars for infrastructure; Settings UI for provider APIs. See docs/AI_AGENT_HANDOFF.md and .cursorrules.
